name: Sir Dep's Oyster-Sausage Dressingg
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince the onions and garlic.
2. Put the oysters in hot water until the edges curl, then pour off the water but save it.
3. Start browning the sausage.
4. Chop the oysters fine.
5. Drain the grease from the sausage.
6. Add the onions, garlic, oysters, and giblets to the sausage.
7. Cook about 15 minutes.
8. Soak the bread or croutons in the oyster water and mash it.
9. Add the meat and remaining ingredients.
10. Mix well. Use salt and pepper to taste.
11. Stuff the turkey with this dressing.
This is the recipe I use for my smoked turkeys. I also sometimes add Polish sausage to the meat for additional flavor (and almost always add a little hot sauce for extra flavor).
